item.title:
RacingTV: Racing TV @RacingTV · 3min "I'm so emotional. Magic."
Lovely interview and great story to kickstart the Coral Scottish
item.description:
Racing TV @RacingTV · 3min "I'm so emotional. Magic."
Lovely interview and great story to kickstart the Coral Scottish Grand National Festival as owner/breeder Ray Anderson Green sees his grandson Lucas Murphy score aboard Tuppence.
Like his dad, the young rider seems a cool customer! @ayrracecourse 3:05 1 2 411

item.title:
AtTheRaces: At The Races @AtTheRaces · 10min Superb improvisation from @skysportsAlexH on comms!
It's a first UK winner for Bays

RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 12min Dan Skelton:
"Next season I want to beat Martin Pipe’s record - and this is how I’m go
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 12min Dan Skelton:
"Next season I want to beat Martin Pipe’s record - and this is how I’m going to do it" De racingpost.com 772

item.title:
RacingTV: Racing TV @RacingTV · 18min 18/1 winner to kick off the Coral Scottish Grand National Festival! @ayrracecourse
Tuppen
item.description:
Racing TV @RacingTV · 18min 18/1 winner to kick off the Coral Scottish Grand National Festival! @ayrracecourse
Tuppence, the only mare in the field, coasts home for @lucindavrussell and @MichaelScu .
A first winner against the professionals for amateur rider Lucas Murphy - son of Timmy 1 1 mil
